name: ipmaltamira
message: Infraestructura Portuaria Mexicana S.A. de C.V. (IPM), subsidiary of PINFRA, was created as a response to 1994 Mexican Federal Government initiative for Port Privatization.  The cession was given to IPM on june 1996 for the operation and management of Terminal #2 on the Port of Altamira, with an extension until year 2036.
